name: Fairway Fix Dallas
address: 10675 E NW Hwy Suite A2850, Dallas, TX 75238
about: Fairway Fix Dallas is a 24/7 indoor golf simulator lounge located in Lake Highlands, Dallas. It features industry-leading TrackMan technology with access to over 400 courses and 13 games. The venue offers monthly memberships and hourly walk-in rates, designed for convenient, flexible, and fun golfing experiences any time of day. Members have 24/7 secure access to swing suites via Open Door technology, while non-members can book during standard hours. The facility is climate-controlled with two new AC units and includes two swing suites, with the potential to expand further.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with secure Open Door technology
Premium TrackMan simulators with over 400 courses
Flexible monthly memberships with no long-term contracts
BYOB and BYOS policy with a relaxed, community-focused atmosphere
Host of leagues, challenges, and events for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: BYOS (Bring Your Own Snacks) policy. Self-service with cleanup expected.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) policy is permitted.

simulator_hardware.notes: Ultra-accurate ball tracking and real-time feedback, trusted by PGA pros

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs. If you forget, loaner clubs are available, including men's RH and kids clubs in various sizes and handedness.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes! Fairway Fix is BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) and BYOS (Bring Your Own Snacks). You are expected to clean up after yourself.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for a full 18-hole round is not specified, but play is managed by a timer that starts once your booking begins and counts down your remaining time. The system auto-shuts off at the end of each time slot.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes. Loaner clubs are available for kids, and the venue hosts events and challenges suitable for families. The relaxed, community-oriented atmosphere makes it accessible for golfers of all ages.
